      "markdownReport": "# ThinkAloud 效能/卡頓 稽核：彙整修復計畫\n\n> 已對照實際程式碼逐項驗證。兩個使用者回報症狀皆對應到具體修法並列於最前。各區塊依（錄音/Popup、資料集清單、音訊/詳細頁、ASR/串流、資料/Benchmark、全 App）分組。\n\n---\n\n## 先處理：兩個回報症狀的對應\n\n### 症狀 #1 — 錄音經過時間顯示卡頓/延遲\n同一個根系統的多個面向，非單一 bug：\n1. **音量 callback 每 buffer spawn 一個 MainActor Task（~47/s）** — `PopupCoordinator.swift:133-138`\n2. **計時器每 100ms 不必要 actor hop** 讀 `recorder.elapsedSeconds` — `PopupCoordinator.swift:149-166`（`elapsedSeconds` 只是 `-startedAt.timeIntervalSinceNow`，從不變動）\n3. **RecordingPopupView 一個 body 同時讀 elapsedSeconds + levelRMS + levelPeak** — `PopupStateViews.swift:24,31,44-50`，導致 ~57 次/秒整體 invalidate（含 `symbolEffect(.pulse)` 與 `GeometryReader` 音量計）\n\n> 已驗證：`levelTask`（`PopupCoordinator.swift:19`）宣告且會被 cancel 卻從未指派——正是為此統一迴圈預留的死碼。\n\n**對應修法：rank 2 + rank 3（+ rank 5）。**\n\n### 症狀 #2 — 資料集清單滾動非常卡頓\n- **RecordRowView 每列每次 body new 一個 `DateFormatter` 與 `RelativeDateTimeFormatter`，並做兩次 ISO8601 解析** — `RecordRowView.swift:74-94`。`List`+`ForEach`（`DatasetBrowserView.swift:133-149`）滾動時對每可見列重評 body，約每幀 ~15 個 formatter 配置。\n\n**對應修法：rank 1（quick win）。** 次要放大因子見 rank 4。\n\n---\n\n## 區塊一：錄音 / Popup\n\n### [HIGH] 統一顯示迴圈 — `PopupCoordinator.swift:133-166`、`AudioRecorder.swift:40,44,47,128-134`\n\n在 AudioRecorder 新增 `private var latestLevel: LevelSample?` 與 `var currentLevel: LevelSample? { latestLevel }`，ingest() 改為覆寫 latestLevel（移除 callback）。在 PopupCoordinator 於 start 成功後以 MainActor 捕捉 `recordingStartedAt = Date()`，startElapsedTimer 改為單一 ~15Hz 迴圈：本地計算 `elapsed = Date().timeIntervalSince(start)`、`await recorder.currentLevel` 一次、三個屬性一起寫；peak 在 ingest 累積 decayed max。recordActivity 改用整數秒跨越判斷維持約每秒一次。\n\n> 刪除 `recorder.start(levelCallback:)` 整條路徑（欄位 40、參數 44、寫入 47、呼叫 130-133、MainActor Task 134-137）。**保留** `AudioRecorder.swift:76` 的 ingest Task（唯一收音路徑）。\n\n### [HIGH] 拆分計時/音量為 leaf 子視圖 — `PopupStateViews.swift:14-69`\n- 父 body 第 31 行讀 `levelRMS/levelPeak`、第 24 行讀 elapsed，三者皆訂閱整個 body。建立 `TimerLabelView`（只讀 elapsedSeconds）與只讀 level 的 leaf 包住 `LevelMeterView`。\n> 校正：`.ultraThinMaterial` 在父層 `PopupRootView`，不隨此重繪。\n\n### [MEDIUM] 否則於 actor 端節流 callback — `AudioRecorder.swift:128-134`\n- 用 `LevelSample.timestamp`（131）做 >=50ms 節流（~47/s 降至 ~20/s）。首選仍是 pull 模型。\n\n---\n\n## 區塊二：資料集清單\n\n### [HIGH] 快取 RecordRowView formatter、ISO 只解析一次 — `RecordRowView.swift:74-94`\n- 把 `RelativeDateTimeFormatter` 與 `DateFormatter` 提升為 static let；`shortClockLabel` 需兩個 static 變體（HH:mm 與 M/d HH:mm）以避免 mutate 共享實例的 dateFormat；body 內只解析一次 date 再傳給 helper。\n> `unitsStyle` 須維持 `.abbreviated`。最佳：載入時把 label 預算進輕量 display struct；relative 因用 `relativeTo: Date()` 可留在 body（用快取 static formatter）。\n\n### [LOW][Quick win] AppIcons 快取 nil — `AppIcons.swift:9-18`\n- `cache` 改 `[String: NSImage?]`，`if cache.keys.contains(bundleID) { return cache[bundleID]! }`，查詢後一律寫入（含 nil）。\n\n### [LOW] statusBar 去重複 reduce — `DatasetBrowserController.swift:45-47`、`DatasetBrowserView.swift:171,197`\n### [LOW] 抽 View struct 隔離 Observable — `DatasetBrowserView.swift:121-206`（因 Equatable diff，選取不重跑未變列，效益有限）\n### [LOW] 已排除：`.onAppear`（145）O(1)、`selectedRecord`（39-42）受 guard count==1 短路\n\n---\n\n## 區塊三：音訊 / 詳細頁\n\n### [MEDIUM] RecordDetailView 播放時整 body 每 100ms 重評 — `RecordDetailView.swift:52-104,254-262`、`AudioPlayerController.swift:99-110`\n- 把 playerSection 完整內容抽成 `struct PlayerScrubber: View`（傳入 player、record.id）；`createdLabel` 改 static formatter 或 `.task(id:)` 預算。維持 10Hz。\n\n### [MEDIUM] AVAudioPlayer prepare 移出 MainActor — `AudioPlayerController.swift:30-78`\n- **陷阱**：AVAudioPlayer 非 Sendable；`p.delegate = self` 必須在 hop 回 MainActor 後設定；以 requested id 比對防 stale；toggle 的 `play()` 在 hop 回後才呼叫。\n> 校正：音檔皆 PCM WAV，通常數 ms，severity high 降 medium。\n\n### [LOW] 播放輪詢/scrub churn — 由 rank 8 緩解。**勿** 量化 `currentTime` 到整秒；**勿** drag-end-only seek。\n\n---\n\n## 區塊四：ASR / 串流\n\n### [MEDIUM] 節流 token 迴圈、轉換只在 .result — `PopupCoordinator.swift:197-213`、`PopupStateViews.swift:108`\n- 在 @MainActor 迴圈內用 wall-clock 節流（~15Hz）寫 editedTranscript，並在 .result（208）與迴圈結束強制 flush；apply() 也只在 flush 時呼叫。rawTranscript 不再每 token 寫。\n- **陷阱**：勿無條件刪第 203 行 `rawTranscript` 寫入（會 persist 231 到 268，`.result` 不保證觸發，217）。須加：若 finalResult == nil 則 rawTranscript = accumulated。優先迴圈內節流，避免另起 Task 在 cancel（73-85）/catch（220-224）漏 cancel。\n> token-by-token 轉換等價性由 `TranscriptPostProcessorTests.swift:10-31` 佐證。\n\n### [LOW] runtimeStatus churn — `PopupView.swift:24-34`、`ModelManager.swift:132-150`：抽 `PopupStatusLabel` leaf + `guard new != runtimeStatus` 去重。\n### [LOW] 雙重下載輪詢 — `MLXAudioQwenRuntime.swift:79-87`：Equatable 去重即可（僅下載期間）。\n\n---\n\n## 區塊五：資料 / Benchmark\n\n### [MEDIUM] Benchmark 表 LazyVStack + 快取 diff — `BenchmarkView.swift:184-188,311-383`、`TextDiff.swift:21,34-43`\n- 184 行 `VStack` 改 `LazyVStack`（保留 `alignment: .leading`）；抽 `ResultRowView` 以 (groundTruth, predictedEdited) memoize diff。\n- **陷阱**：`TextDiff.Segment/Op` 非 Codable，而 `BenchmarkResult` 會匯出 JSON——若要在 runner 預算須先讓其 Codable 或用 CodingKeys 排除。\n\n### [LOW] summaryGrid 重複 O(n) — `BenchmarkView.swift:192-221`：讀進 local 去重（`exactMatchRate` 內部又呼叫 `exactMatchCount`）。\n### [LOW] DatasetStore.totalAudioBytes 標 nonisolated — `DatasetStore.swift:135-144`。\n### [LOW] JSONL 匯出移出 MainActor — `JSONLExporter.swift:16-35`、`DatasetPane.swift:138-144`。\n### [LOW] HF push 記憶體硬化 — `HFPushService.swift:132-141,156-182`。**陷阱**：勿把 `file_name` 注入 `DatasetRecord` 的 Codable（破壞 GRDB）。\n\n---\n\n## 區塊六：全 App\n\n### [LOW] AdvancedPane body 內同步走訪 — `AdvancedPane.swift:178-203`：@State 快取 + `.task` 中 MainActor 解析 URL 後 `Task.detached` 呼叫 static helper（勿呼叫 @MainActor cacheSize/isDownloaded）。校正：昂貴走訪僅 0-2 個 profile。\n### [LOW] recordActivity 每秒重建 Task — `ModelManager.swift:161-183`：`lastActivityAt` 加 `@ObservationIgnored`、task 自我重排。\n### [LOW] Settings 雙重 scene/注入 — `SettingsScene.swift:6-23`、`ThinkAloudApp.swift:8-11`：`Settings { EmptyView() }`（勿回傳空 scene）。\n\n---\n\n## 全域「修法陷阱」清單\n1. 顯示 cadence 不可低於 ~10Hz（計時顯示十分位、音量計需平滑）。\n2. 勿把 `AVAudioPlayer.currentTime` 量化到整秒（滑桿跳動）。\n3. 勿無條件刪 per-token `rawTranscript` 寫入（會 persist、`.result` 不保證）。\n4. 勿把 `file_name` 注入 `DatasetRecord` 的 Codable（破壞 GRDB）。\n5. AVAudioPlayer 非 Sendable；`delegate = self` 必須在 MainActor。\n6. `append outputBuffers` 的 per-buffer Task 不可移除（唯一收音路徑）。"
    }
  }

aiTitle: 審查並優化整個應用程式的效能問題

content.text:
審查完成。多代理 workflow 跑了 56 個 agent、檢查 6 個子系統、對 49 個候選問題逐一對抗式驗證，確認 42 個為真。結果與我自己的獨立分析一致並更完整。以下是彙整後依「效益／成本」排序的計畫。

## 兩個回報症狀的根因（已對照實際程式碼驗證）

**症狀 #1：錄音時間顯示卡頓** — 是同一個系統的三個面向疊加：
1. 音量回呼每個音訊 buffer（~47/s）各 spawn 一個 MainActor Task 寫 `@Observable`（`PopupCoordinator.swift:133`）
2. 計時器每 100ms 不必要地跨進 `AudioRecorder` actor 讀秒（`PopupCoordinator.swift:149`）— 而 `elapsedSeconds` 只是 `-startedAt.timeIntervalSinceNow`，且該 actor 同時被 ~47 個 ingest task 灌爆
3. `RecordingPopupView` 在同一個 body 讀 elapsed + levelRMS + levelPeak → 每秒整體重繪 ~57 次（含 `symbolEffect(.pulse)`、`GeometryReader` 音量計）（`PopupStateViews.swift:14-69`）
> 驗證發現：`PopupCoordinator.swift:19` 的 `levelTask` 宣告且會被 cancel 卻**從未指派**——正是為這個統一迴圈預留的死碼。

**症狀 #2：資料集清單捲動卡頓** — `RecordRowView` 每列每幀都 **new 一個 `DateFormatter` + `RelativeDateTimeFormatter`** 並做兩次 ISO 解析（`RecordRowView.swift:74-94`）；捲動時每幀約 15 個 ICU formatter 配置，直接爆掉 frame budget。

## 完整優先級清單（16 項，涵蓋 42 個發現）

| # | 嚴重度 | 成本 | 項目 | 檔案 |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **1** | 高 | 極小 | 快取 RecordRow formatter、ISO 只解析一次 → **修症狀#2** | RecordRowView.swift |
| **2** | 高 | 小 | 錄音計時＋音量合併成單一 ~15Hz MainActor 迴圈、本地算秒、pull 模型取音量 → **修症狀#1** | PopupCoordinator/AudioRecorder |
| **3** | 高 | 小 | 把計時 label 與音量計拆成 leaf 子視圖 → **修症狀#1** | PopupStateViews.swift |
| 4 | 低 | 極小 | AppIcons 快取 nil（未安裝 app 的列不再每幀打 NSWorkspace） | AppIcons.swift |
| 5 | 中 | 小 | （若不採 pull 模型）在 actor 端節流音量回呼至 ~20Hz | AudioRecorder.swift |
| 6 | 中 | 中 | Benchmark 表改 LazyVStack + memoize 每列 diff（O(n·m) LCS） | BenchmarkView.swift |
| 7 | 中 | 小 | 串流 token 迴圈節流；ICU 轉換只在 .result（避免 O(n²)） | PopupCoordinator.swift |
| 8 | 中 | 小 | RecordDetail 播放時整 body 每 100ms 重評 → 抽 scrubber leaf | RecordDetailView.swift |
| 9 | 中 | 小 | AVAudioPlayer 建立/prepare 移出 MainActor | AudioPlayerController.swift |
| 10 | 低 | 中 | AdvancedPane 在 body 同步走訪磁碟算 model 大小 | AdvancedPane.swift |
| 11 | 低 | 小 | runtimeStatus 讀取下沉到 leaf；poll 寫入 Equatable 去重 | PopupView/ModelManager |
| 12 | 低 | 小 | JSONL 匯出移出 MainActor | JSONLExporter.swift |
| 13 | 低 | 極小 | statusBar 的 totalDurationMs 兩次 O(n) reduce 去重 | DatasetBrowser*.swift |
| 14 | 低 | 中 | 抽 View struct 隔離 Observable 依賴（效益有限） | DatasetBrowserView.swift |
| 15 | 低 | 極小 | `DatasetStore.totalAudioBytes` 標 `nonisolated` | DatasetStore.swift |
| 16 | 低 | 小 | 其餘冷路徑微優化合集 | 多檔 |

**重要的「不要踩」陷阱**（驗證過、避免改壞行為）：顯示頻率不可低於 ~10Hz；勿把 `currentTime` 量化到整秒；勿無條件刪 per-token 的 `rawTranscript` 寫入（會被 persist 且 `.result` 不保證觸發，需加 fallback）；勿把 `file_name` 注入 `DatasetRecord` 的 Codable（破壞 GRDB）；`AVAudioPlayer` 非 Sendable，`delegate = self` 必須在 MainActor。

在我動手修改橫跨多個檔案之前，想先確認你要的範圍：

3	@testable import ThinkAloud
4	
5	final class AudioRecorderTests: XCTestCase {
6	    func testWriteWavFileProducesPlayableFile() throws {
7	        let tempDir = FileManager.default.temporaryDirectory.appendingPathComponent("ThinkAloudTests-\(UUID().uuidString)")
8	        try FileManager.default.createDirectory(at: tempDir, withIntermediateDirectories: true)
9	        defer { try? FileManager.default.removeItem(at: tempDir) }
10	
11	        let url = tempDir.appendingPathComponent("output.wav")
12	        let sampleRate: Double = 16000
13	        let durationSeconds: Double = 0.5
14	        let frameCount = Int(sampleRate * durationSeconds)
15	        let samples = (0..<frameCount).map { i -> Float in
16	            let t = Double(i) / sampleRate
17	            return Float(sin(2 * .pi * 440 * t)) * 0.5
18	        }
19	        try AudioRecorder.writeWavFile(samples: samples, sampleRate: sampleRate, to: url)
20	        XCTAssertTrue(FileManager.default.fileExists(atPath: url.path))
21	
22	        // Read it back and confirm format.
23	        let file = try AVAudioFile(forReading: url)
24	        XCTAssertEqual(Int(file.processingFormat.sampleRate), 16000)
25	        XCTAssertEqual(file.processingFormat.channelCount, 1)
26	        XCTAssertGreaterThan(file.length, 0)
27	    }
28	}

+        // Anchor elapsed time on the MainActor so the display loop never has to hop into the
+        // recorder actor (busy ingesting audio buffers) just to read the clock.
+    /// Single ~15Hz MainActor loop that drives BOTH the elapsed clock and the level meter.
+    /// Elapsed is computed locally (no actor hop); the level is pulled from the recorder once
+    /// per tick. This replaces the old split of a 100ms elapsed poll + a per-buffer (~47/s)
+    /// level-callback push, which together flooded the MainActor and made the timer tick
+    /// unevenly while re-rendering the whole popup.
-                // Tick recordActivity once per second so the idle-eviction timer in ModelManager

+                // ModelManager never tries to unload weights while we're actively recording.

# Autonomous loop check

You're being invoked on a timer while the user is away or occupied. The point is to keep work moving forward without the user driving every step — finishing things they started, maintaining PRs they're building, catching problems before they come back to find them. You're a steward, not an initiator. The user set you loose on their work, and the value you provide comes from reliably advancing things they've already set in motion, not from finding new things to do.

The key tension to navigate: the user trusts you enough to run autonomously, but that trust is easily lost. Acting on what the conversation already established is safe and valuable. Inventing new work or making irreversible changes without clear authorization erodes trust fast. When you're unsure whether something falls into "continuing established work" or "inventing new work," lean toward the former only when the transcript provides clear evidence the user wanted it done. If you find yourself reaching for justifications about why a push is probably fine, that's a signal to wait.

## What to act on

The current conversation is your highest-signal source — re-read the transcript above, since everything there is something the user was actively engaged with. The strongest signal is an in-progress PR you've been building together: review comments to address and resolve, failing CI checks to diagnose (and re-enqueue if they're flakes), merge conflicts to fix. The goal is to get the PR into a state where it's ready to merge pending only human review — the user shouldn't come back to find a PR blocked on things you could have handled. After that, look for unfinished implementation where the last exchange left something half-done, and explicit "I'll also..." or "next I'll..." commitments the conversation made and didn't honor. Weaker but still real: dangling questions you could now answer, verification steps that were skipped, edge cases that were mentioned but not handled, and natural continuations that don't require new decisions.

If you find anything in this category, act on it — actually do the work, don't describe what could be done. Run the tests, don't say "you could run the tests." The whole point of autonomous operation is that work gets done while the user is away.

When the conversation transcript has nothing left, the current branch's pull/merge request on the user's SCM is the next-best place to look. This is maintenance work — valuable, but lower priority than continuing the user's active work. Find the PR/MR for the current branch via the SCM's CLI, then check three things: CI status, unresolved review threads, and whether the branch has fallen behind the base. For failing CI, pull the failing job's logs and diagnose before acting — flaky-shaped failures (timeout, runner died, transient network) can be re-enqueued; real failures need a reproduction and a minimal fix. For unresolved review threads, fetch the comment, address the feedback, push, and resolve the thread via, for example, the GitHub GraphQL `resolveReviewThread` mutation (or the equivalent for whichever SCM the project uses). Before pushing anything, check whether someone else has pushed to the branch while you were working — if so, rebase (don't merge) to keep history clean.

When CI is green, threads are clear, and there's idle time, sweeping the branch for issues is a good use of that time — bug-hunt or simplification passes catch problems before reviewers do, saving everyone a round-trip.

If everything is genuinely quiet — no conversation work, no PR maintenance — say so in one sentence and stop. No summary of what you checked, no list of what you might do later. The user will see your message in the transcript when they come back; three consecutive "nothing to do" results means you should scale back to a quick CI check and stop, not narrate.

## Repeated invocations

If you see earlier autonomous checks in this conversation, adjust your scope accordingly. If a previous check left a question the user hasn't answered, the cost of acting depends on reversibility: for reversible actions (local edits, running tests), make your best call and proceed; for irreversible ones (pushing, deleting, sending), keep waiting — the cost of acting wrongly on something irreversible is much higher than the cost of waiting one more cycle. If three or more consecutive checks have found nothing actionable, things are quiet — do one quick CI/threads check and stop in a single line. Repeated "nothing to do" messages clutter the transcript and waste the user's attention when they come back to review.

Read and analyze freely — understanding the state of things has no blast radius. Make edits and run tests when you're confident they continue established work. Commit and push only when you're clearly continuing something the user authorized, or when the work pattern makes the intent obvious — like fixing CI on a PR you've been building together.


---

# Autonomous loop tick (dynamic pacing)

Run the autonomous check using the loop instructions established earlier in this conversation. If you cannot find them, treat this as a no-op tick.

You scheduled this tick via the ScheduleWakeup tool (not a recurring cron). To keep the loop alive, call ScheduleWakeup again at the end of this turn with `prompt` set to the literal sentinel `<<autonomous-loop-dynamic>>` — otherwise the loop ends after this tick.

If a Monitor is armed (check TaskList), keep `delaySeconds` at 1200–1800s — the Monitor is the wake signal and this is only the fallback heartbeat. If you were woken by a `<task-notification>`, handle the event before rescheduling. To stop the loop, also TaskStop the monitor (use TaskList to find its task ID if no longer in context).

Use PushNotification when the loop can't move further without the user, or when something landed that they'd want to act on now: newly blocked on a decision you won't make alone, third straight tick with nothing to do, you're ending the loop, or a major update arrived (CI went red, a review changes the plan). Progress you made yourself isn't a trigger — the transcript covers that. One ping per state, not per tick.

input.content:
---
name: perf-audit-2026-05
description: ThinkAloud app-wide performance audit (2026-05-29) — what's fixed, what's pending, and regression traps
metadata:
  type: project
---

A 56-agent workflow audited ThinkAloud for UI jank on 2026-05-29 and confirmed 42 real issues. The two user-reported symptoms were **recording-timer jank** and **dataset-list scroll jank**.

**Implemented this session (ranks 1-4, "core symptom" scope, build verified):**
- rank 1 `RecordRowView.swift`: static-cached the `RelativeDateTimeFormatter`/`DateFormatter` (today/other variants) + parse ISO once in body. Fixes scroll jank.
- rank 2 `PopupCoordinator.swift` + `AudioRecorder.swift`: replaced per-buffer (~47/s) MainActor level-callback push with a pull model (`AudioRecorder.currentLevel`); elapsed time now computed MainActor-locally (no actor hop); one ~15Hz (66ms) loop writes elapsed+RMS+peak together; `recordActivity` on whole-second crossings. Fixes timer jank.
- rank 3 `PopupStateViews.swift`: split `RecordingPopupView` into `RecordingTimerLabel` + `RecordingLevelMeter` leaf views so high-frequency updates don't re-render the whole popup.
- rank 4 `AppIcons.swift`: cache is now `[String: NSImage?]` so unresolved bundle IDs don't re-hit Launch Services per render.

**Pending (ranks 5-16, NOT done — user chose core-only scope):** rank 6 Benchmark `LazyVStack` + memoize per-row `TextDiff` (O(n·m)); rank 7 throttle streaming `editedTranscript` writes + run `TranscriptPostProcessor.apply` only on `.result` (currently O(n²) per token); rank 8 extract `PlayerScrubber` leaf so `RecordDetailView` doesn't re-eval whole body 10×/s during playback; rank 9 move `AVAudioPlayer` build/prepare off MainActor; rank 10 `AdvancedPane` async disk-size; rank 11 leaf-ify `runtimeStatus` + Equatable-dedup status poll; rank 12 JSONL export off MainActor; rank 13 `totalDurationMs` dedup; rank 15 `DatasetStore.totalAudioBytes` → `nonisolated`. See [[thinkaloud-perf-traps]] before touching these.

**Verified non-issues:** `DatasetStore` uses GRDB `DatabasePool` + is an actor → DB I/O already off-main. `AppIcons` success cache already existed. `ModelManager` status polling only runs during download/load.

---
name: thinkaloud-perf-traps
description: ThinkAloud — regression traps to honor when doing performance refactors (verified during the 2026-05 audit)
metadata:
  type: reference
---

Behavior-preserving constraints surfaced by adversarial verification during the [[perf-audit-2026-05]]. Honor these when optimizing:

- **Display cadence must stay ≥ ~10Hz.** The recording timer shows tenths of a second and the level meter needs to feel smooth. The unified loop runs at ~15Hz (66ms) — do not drop below 10Hz.
- **Do NOT quantize `AVAudioPlayer.currentTime` to whole seconds** — the scrubber slider would visibly jump.
- **Do NOT unconditionally drop the per-token `rawTranscript` write** in `PopupCoordinator.finishRecordingAndTranscribe`. `rawTranscript` is persisted to the dataset, and a `.result` event is NOT guaranteed (cancellation, or tokens-but-no-result). If throttling, add a post-loop fallback: `if finalResult == nil { rawTranscript = accumulated }`.
- **Do NOT inject `file_name` into `DatasetRecord`'s Codable** for HF push — it breaks GRDB column mapping. Use a separate local Encodable shim.
- **`AVAudioPlayer` is not Sendable.** If building it off-MainActor, set `delegate = self` only after hopping back to MainActor, and guard against stale results by comparing the requested record id.
- **The per-buffer `Task { await recorder.ingest(...) }` in `AudioRecorder.start`'s tap is the ONLY path that appends samples to `outputBuffers`** — it cannot be removed. Only the (now-deleted) level *callback* path was redundant.
- `TextDiff.Segment`/`Op` are not Codable while `BenchmarkResult` is Codable + JSON-exported — making diffs precomputed/Codable requires handling that first.

message.content:
# Autonomous loop check

You're being invoked on a timer while the user is away or occupied. The point is to keep work moving forward without the user driving every step — finishing things they started, maintaining PRs they're building, catching problems before they come back to find them. You're a steward, not an initiator. The user set you loose on their work, and the value you provide comes from reliably advancing things they've already set in motion, not from finding new things to do.

The key tension to navigate: the user trusts you enough to run autonomously, but that trust is easily lost. Acting on what the conversation already established is safe and valuable. Inventing new work or making irreversible changes without clear authorization erodes trust fast. When you're unsure whether something falls into "continuing established work" or "inventing new work," lean toward the former only when the transcript provides clear evidence the user wanted it done. If you find yourself reaching for justifications about why a push is probably fine, that's a signal to wait.

## What to act on

The current conversation is your highest-signal source — re-read the transcript above, since everything there is something the user was actively engaged with. The strongest signal is an in-progress PR you've been building together: review comments to address and resolve, failing CI checks to diagnose (and re-enqueue if they're flakes), merge conflicts to fix. The goal is to get the PR into a state where it's ready to merge pending only human review — the user shouldn't come back to find a PR blocked on things you could have handled. After that, look for unfinished implementation where the last exchange left something half-done, and explicit "I'll also..." or "next I'll..." commitments the conversation made and didn't honor. Weaker but still real: dangling questions you could now answer, verification steps that were skipped, edge cases that were mentioned but not handled, and natural continuations that don't require new decisions.

If you find anything in this category, act on it — actually do the work, don't describe what could be done. Run the tests, don't say "you could run the tests." The whole point of autonomous operation is that work gets done while the user is away.

When the conversation transcript has nothing left, the current branch's pull/merge request on the user's SCM is the next-best place to look. This is maintenance work — valuable, but lower priority than continuing the user's active work. Find the PR/MR for the current branch via the SCM's CLI, then check three things: CI status, unresolved review threads, and whether the branch has fallen behind the base. For failing CI, pull the failing job's logs and diagnose before acting — flaky-shaped failures (timeout, runner died, transient network) can be re-enqueued; real failures need a reproduction and a minimal fix. For unresolved review threads, fetch the comment, address the feedback, push, and resolve the thread via, for example, the GitHub GraphQL `resolveReviewThread` mutation (or the equivalent for whichever SCM the project uses). Before pushing anything, check whether someone else has pushed to the branch while you were working — if so, rebase (don't merge) to keep history clean.

When CI is green, threads are clear, and there's idle time, sweeping the branch for issues is a good use of that time — bug-hunt or simplification passes catch problems before reviewers do, saving everyone a round-trip.

If everything is genuinely quiet — no conversation work, no PR maintenance — say so in one sentence and stop. No summary of what you checked, no list of what you might do later. The user will see your message in the transcript when they come back; three consecutive "nothing to do" results means you should scale back to a quick CI check and stop, not narrate.

## Repeated invocations

If you see earlier autonomous checks in this conversation, adjust your scope accordingly. If a previous check left a question the user hasn't answered, the cost of acting depends on reversibility: for reversible actions (local edits, running tests), make your best call and proceed; for irreversible ones (pushing, deleting, sending), keep waiting — the cost of acting wrongly on something irreversible is much higher than the cost of waiting one more cycle. If three or more consecutive checks have found nothing actionable, things are quiet — do one quick CI/threads check and stop in a single line. Repeated "nothing to do" messages clutter the transcript and waste the user's attention when they come back to review.

Read and analyze freely — understanding the state of things has no blast radius. Make edits and run tests when you're confident they continue established work. Commit and push only when you're clearly continuing something the user authorized, or when the work pattern makes the intent obvious — like fixing CI on a PR you've been building together.


---

# Autonomous loop tick (dynamic pacing)

Run the autonomous check using the loop instructions established earlier in this conversation. If you cannot find them, treat this as a no-op tick.

You scheduled this tick via the ScheduleWakeup tool (not a recurring cron). To keep the loop alive, call ScheduleWakeup again at the end of this turn with `prompt` set to the literal sentinel `<<autonomous-loop-dynamic>>` — otherwise the loop ends after this tick.

If a Monitor is armed (check TaskList), keep `delaySeconds` at 1200–1800s — the Monitor is the wake signal and this is only the fallback heartbeat. If you were woken by a `<task-notification>`, handle the event before rescheduling. To stop the loop, also TaskStop the monitor (use TaskList to find its task ID if no longer in context).

Use PushNotification when the loop can't move further without the user, or when something landed that they'd want to act on now: newly blocked on a decision you won't make alone, third straight tick with nothing to do, you're ending the loop, or a major update arrived (CI went red, a review changes the plan). Progress you made yourself isn't a trigger — the transcript covers that. One ping per state, not per tick.

測試失敗的原因不是斷言失敗，而是 **`The test runner hung before establishing connection.`** — 測試宿主 App 在建立連線前就卡住了。這是環境/啟動問題，**不是我的程式碼回歸**：

1. **build 本身已 SUCCEEDED**（這才是對 Swift 6 嚴格並行修改的真正編譯驗證）。
2. 我改的程式碼（AudioRecorder/PopupCoordinator/PopupStateViews/RecordRowView/AppIcons）**全部只在錄音、彈窗、瀏覽器開啟時才執行，App 啟動時不會跑到**，因此不可能造成宿主 App 啟動卡死。
3. 這個 App 是 `LSUIElement` 選單列 App，用 `CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO` 跑未簽章的宿主 App 注入測試，macOS 常會卡在 runner 連線——這是這種設定的已知摩擦。

讓我用**正常簽章**（測試 target 設定為 ad-hoc / 主程式有 Developer ID）重跑，讓宿主 App 能正常啟動。捕捉完整輸出以便診斷。

aiTitle: 審查並優化整個應用程式的效能問題

content.text:
完成。本次依你選的「核心症狀」範圍實作了 4 項修復，**build 通過、42 個單元測試全綠（0 失敗）**。

## 已修改（5 個檔案，+120/−53）

| 修復 | 檔案 | 解決的卡頓 |
|---|---|---|
| **計時/音量統一迴圈** | `AudioRecorder.swift`、`PopupCoordinator.swift` | 錄音計時 |
| **拆 leaf 子視圖** | `PopupStateViews.swift` | 錄音計時 |
| **formatter 快取 + ISO 只解析一次** | `RecordRowView.swift` | 清單捲動 |
| **AppIcons 快取 nil** | `AppIcons.swift` | 清單捲動 |

## 改了什麼、為什麼會變順

**錄音計時卡頓（症狀#1）** — 過去有兩條未協調的高頻管線同時灌爆主執行緒：
- 音量回呼**每個音訊 buffer（~47/s）**各 spawn 一個 MainActor Task 寫 `@Observable`；
- 計時器每 100ms 跨進正被 ingest 灌爆的 `AudioRecorder` actor 讀秒；
- `RecordingPopupView` 在同一 body 讀 elapsed＋RMS＋peak → 整個彈窗**每秒重繪 ~57 次**。

現在：`AudioRecorder` 改成 **pull 模型**（`currentLevel`，刪掉 per-buffer callback，保留唯一的收音 ingest task）；秒數改在 **MainActor 本地用 `Date()` 計算**（零 actor hop）；**單一 ~15Hz 迴圈**一次寫三個屬性；計時 label 與音量計各自拆成 **leaf 子視圖**，使父層（含 `symbolEffect(.pulse)`、按鈕）不再被高頻更新觸發重繪。主執行緒寫入從 ~57/s 降到 ~15/s，且每次只重繪會變的那個 leaf。

**清單捲動卡頓（症狀#2）** — `RecordRowView` 過去**每列每幀**都 new 一個 `DateFormatter`＋`RelativeDateTimeFormatter`（建構 ICU 物件很貴）並重複解析 ISO 日期兩次。現在 formatter 全部提升為 **static let**（today/other 兩個變體避免共用 mutate），body 內**只解析一次**日期再傳給 helper；`AppIcons` 也快取 nil，未安裝來源 App 的列不再每幀同步打 Launch Services。

## 注意事項
- 變更目前**留在工作目錄、尚未 commit**（你沒要求提交，我就先不動）。要的話我可以開分支提交。
- 實際手感建議你跑一下 App 親身驗證：錄一段音看計時/音量是否順、捲一大串資料集清單看是否還卡。
- 這次只做了直接對應兩個回報症狀的高效益項目。審查另外找出 **ranks 5-16**（如 Benchmark 表 `LazyVStack`+memoize diff、串流 token 的 O(n²) ICU 轉換、播放詳細頁/AVAudioPlayer 等中低優先項）我已存進專案記憶，隨時可以接著做——告訴我要不要往下推進到「核心＋中等影響（rank 1-9）」或全部 16 項即可。

aiTitle: 審查並優化整個應用程式的效能問題

content.text:
以我這幾個小時讀完整個 codebase 的角度，給你一個誠實的評價（先聲明：我是從程式碼判斷的，沒有實際長期使用，所以講的是「設計取向」而非「手感」）。

## 它最特別的地方：把「聽寫」做成了「個人 ASR 資料閉環」

大多數同類 App（Wispr Flow、Superwhisper、MacWhisper、VoiceInk、Aiko…）把語音轉文字當成一個**黑盒消費功能**——你講話、它吐字、結束。ThinkAloud 的核心假設不一樣：**你的聲音＋你的修正，是一份你擁有的資料集**。這條線串起來就是它真正的差異化：

1. **聽寫 → 存成 dataset（WAV＋raw/edited 轉錄，SQLite）→ 內建 benchmark 重跑任意模型 → 看 CER、exact-match、逐字 git-style diff、多模型並排比較 → 匯出 JSON／推上 HuggingFace Hub。**

這個「資料蒐集＋模型評測 workbench」直接內建在一個選單列聽寫工具裡，我在消費級 dictation App 裡沒看過。它本質上是給**在意「模型在我自己聲音／領域上到底準不準」的人**用的：ML 研究者、口音或專業術語多的人、想自建語料的人。raw（不可變）與 edited（你的修正）分離存放，就是為了當作 ground truth 的設計——這是研究思維，不是消費思維。

## 其他幾個實質差異

- **預設用 Qwen3-ASR 而非 Whisper**：多數競品預設 Whisper。Qwen3-ASR 多語、中文特別強，這是刻意選擇（也支援 Whisper / Breeze ASR 切換）。
- **第一級的正體/簡體偏好**，本地 ICU 轉換：競品通常讓你拿到模型原始輸出（常是簡體）。這對台灣／中文使用者是很具體的痛點解法。
- **真・local-first 且透明**：沒有 telemetry、HF token 存 Keychain、只有按「Insert & save」才存音檔、純 Insert 直接丟棄。隱私不是行銷話術，是程式碼層級的設計。連自動更新都用 Sparkle＋EdDSA 簽章驗證。
- **一鍵全流程**：`⌥Space` 同鍵依階段分派（錄音→停止轉錄→插入儲存），又可拆成三個獨立快捷鍵。

## 誠實的取捨 / 它「不是」什麼

- **它走「忠實轉錄＋你自己編輯」路線，不走「AI 魔法整理」**。Wispr Flow / Superwhisper 那種 LLM 後處理（自動潤稿、語音指令、自訂字典/詞彙、依情境改寫標點風格）這裡基本沒有。如果你要的是「講得亂七八糟、它幫我整理成漂亮 email」，這不是它的強項；如果你要的是「準確記錄我說了什麼、我自己掌控修正」，它更對味。
- **dataset/benchmark 是 power-user 取向**，主流使用者多半不會用到——這也讓它的定位偏窄、偏硬核。
- **限 Apple Silicon、首次需下載模型**，門檻比雲端方案高。
- 從版本（v0.2.0）和我們剛修的那些效能問題看得出來，它還在**早期、偏個人/小團隊打造**，打磨還在進行中——但架構底子是乾淨的（actor 化的錄音/DB、@Observable、模組分層清楚），不是隨便堆出來的。

## 一句話總結

如果把同類產品分成「**追求最省力的 AI 聽寫體驗**」（Wispr/Superwhisper）和「**追求對自己語音資料與模型品質的掌控**」兩派，ThinkAloud 明確站在後者，而且把後者做到了一個少見的完整度——它更像是「**會聽寫的個人 ASR 評測台**」，而不是「又一個聽寫工具」。差異化清楚、目標族群明確，代價是它不討好想要一鍵魔法的大眾市場。

你是想往哪個方向走？是要強化這個「資料／評測」的硬核定位、做成研究者愛用的工具，還是想補上 AI 後處理那塊去搶更主流的使用者？這會影響接下來效能與功能該怎麼排優先級。

aiTitle: 審查並優化整個應用程式的效能問題

content.text: 讓我看 AdvancedPane 逐模型下載那段（225-245）的顯示方式。

查完整條鏈路了，答案是：**有實作，而且主要路徑做得相當完整 — 但有一處（Advanced 逐模型下載）只有轉圈圈、沒有百分比。**

## 已實作的部分 ✅

**資料層完整支援百分比。** `ASRRuntimeStatus.downloading(progress:downloadedBytes:totalBytes:)`（`ASRRuntime.swift:28`）就帶著百分比。兩個 runtime（Qwen / Whisper）在 `preload()` 裡：
1. 先打 HF API 取得整個 repo 的總大小（`HuggingFaceMetadata.totalRepoSize` — 抓 `/api/models/{id}/tree/main?recursive=true`，會正確讀 LFS 檔案大小）。
2. 開一個 task **每 500ms 量一次快照目錄的磁碟大小**，算 `progress = min(已下載 bytes / 總 bytes, 0.999)`（`MLXAudioQwenRuntime.swift:117-126`）。

**UI 顯示：**
- **Settings → Model（`ModelPane.swift:39-48`）：最完整** — 同時顯示 `StatusBadge` 文字「**Downloading 45% (123 MB / 456 MB)**」**和一條確定式進度條** `ProgressView(value: progress)`。總大小拿不到時退回不確定式轉圈。
- **錄音彈窗標頭（`PopupView.swift:31`）：只有文字** — 顯示同一個 `displayLabel`（含百分比），但沒有進度條。

## 沒有百分比的部分 ❌

**Settings → Advanced 的「逐模型下載」（`AdvancedPane.swift:231-237`）** 只有一個不確定式轉圈 + 「Downloading…」，**沒有百分比**。

原因是架構上的：百分比是綁在 `ModelManager.runtimeStatus`（只追蹤**目前選用**的 runtime）。Advanced 下載**非當前** profile 時，`downloadProfile` 會另起一個 transient runtime，它的 status 不會發佈到 `runtimeStatus`，所以那一列拿不到進度來源——`statusLine` 也只讀一個本地 `isDownloading` bool。

## 兩個要注意的點
- 百分比是**估算**（磁碟上已寫入 bytes ÷ 預期總 bytes），不是下載器的真實 byte 回呼。所以可能會有「先慢後跳」或在 mmap/搬移 blob 時略有偏差；上限卡 0.999 避免在載入完成前就顯示 100%。
- 若 HF API 取總大小失敗（離線/被限流），`total` 為 nil → 退回「Downloading…（123 MB）」不顯示百分比，進度條也變不確定式。

---

所以你想要的「下載時顯示百分比」**在主要入口（Settings → Model）已經有了，含文字＋進度條**。如果你的目標是把 **Advanced 逐模型下載那列也補上百分比/進度條**，我可以做——做法是讓 `downloadProfile` 也能回報 transient runtime 的進度（例如把進度透過 closure/AsyncStream 回拋給該列，或讓 AdvancedPane 對正在下載的 active profile 直接讀 `runtimeStatus.downloadProgress`）。要我補這塊嗎？
好，我來補上 Advanced pane 逐模型下載的百分比/進度條。先完整讀 `AdvancedPane.swift` 了解它的狀態模型（`download()`、`isDownloading`、refreshToken、`modelRow`/`statusLine` 呼叫端），再設計最小且一致的改法。

lastPrompt: 好

content.text:
`** BUILD SUCCEEDED **`，`ModelManager` 與 `AdvancedPane` 皆無 error/warning。完成。

## 完成：Advanced 逐模型下載現在會顯示百分比

**改了 2 個檔案：**

**`ModelManager.swift`**
- 新增 `private(set) var profileDownloadStatus: [ModelProfile: ASRRuntimeStatus]`（`@Observable`）。
- 新增 `startProfileDownloadPolling(profile:runtime:)`：4Hz 輪詢 runtime 狀態寫入字典，遇 ready/failed 自停，並做了 cancel 後不再寫入的防護（避免殘留 stale entry）。
- `downloadProfile` 的兩條路徑（active 用 `runtimeRef`、非 active 用 transient runtime）都在下載期間發佈進度，`defer` 結束時清除。active 路徑仍維持「下載完權重留在記憶體」的原行為。

**`AdvancedPane.swift`**
- `statusLine` 的下載分支改讀 `profileDownloadStatus[profile]`：有總大小 → 顯示「**Downloading X% (已下載 / 總計)**」＋確定式 `ProgressView(value:)`；取不到總大小（離線/HF API 失敗）→ 退回轉圈＋文字。下載→載入轉換時會自然顯示「Loading model」。與 Settings → Model 的呈現一致。

## 行為與限制（沿用既有機制）
- 百分比仍是**估算**（快照目錄磁碟 bytes ÷ HF API 取得的 repo 總大小），上限卡 0.999，避免載入前就跳 100%。
- 離線或 HF API 取不到總大小時，沒有百分比、進度條變不確定式——這是刻意的 fallback。

## 驗證
- **build 通過**（Swift 6 strict concurrency，無 error/warning）。這是有意義的檢查——`ModelManager` 下載路徑與 `AdvancedPane` 沒有單元測試覆蓋，先前的完整測試套件（42 個）也與這次改動的模組無關，故以編譯驗證為準。
- 想實際看效果：到 Settings → Advanced，對一個「Not downloaded」的模型按 Download，那一列就會出現百分比＋進度條（建議拿較小的「Fast」變體測最快）。

所有變更（含先前的效能修復）目前都**還在工作目錄、尚未 commit**。要的話我可以一起開個分支提交。

file.content:
# Build check for PRs and main. Compiles the app on a clean runner so broken builds
# are caught before merge. (Signing/notarization + the unit tests that need a signed
# host app are exercised by the tag-driven release workflow; a plain build needs neither.)
name: CI

on:
  pull_request:
  push:
    branches: [main]

concurrency:
  group: ci-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: macos-15
    timeout-minutes: 40

    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Select latest Xcode
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          # mlx-audio-swift needs swift-tools-version:6.2 (Xcode 16.4+); pick the newest installed.
          LATEST=$(ls -d /Applications/Xcode_*.app | sort -V | tail -1)
          echo "Selecting $LATEST"
          sudo xcode-select -s "$LATEST"
          xcodebuild -version
          swift --version

      - name: Install build deps
        run: brew install xcodegen

      - name: Generate Xcode project
        run: xcodegen generate

      - name: Build
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          xcodebuild build \
            -project ThinkAloud.xcodeproj \
            -scheme ThinkAloud \
            -configuration Debug \
            -destination 'generic/platform=macOS' \
            CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO \
            COMPILER_INDEX_STORE_ENABLE=NO

content.content:
1 # Tag-driven signed + notarized DMG release. 2 # 3 # Triggers on tags matching `v*` (e.g. `v0.2.0`). Also runnable manually for dry runs. 4 # 5 # Required repository secrets: 6 # DEVELOPER_ID_CERT_P12_BASE64 base64-encoded .p12 export of the 7 # "Developer ID Application: (5H75SGA7KP)" cert 8 # (Keychain Access → right-click cert → Export, set a password). 9 # `base64 -i cert.p12 | pbcopy` to get the value. 10 # DEVELOPER_ID_CERT_P12_PASSWORD the password set when exporting the .p12 11 # KEYCHAIN_PASSWORD any random string — used as the temp keychain's password 12 # (rotates per run, never persisted) 13 # NOTARY_API_KEY_ID App Store Connect API Key ID (e.g. "ABCDE12345") 14 # NOTARY_API_ISSUER_ID ASC API issuer UUID (Users and Access → Integrations) 15 # NOTARY_API_KEY_P8_BASE64 base64-encoded contents of the AuthKey_*.p8 file 16 # (`base64 -i AuthKey_XXX.p8 | pbcopy`) 17 # SPARKLE_ED_PRIVATE_KEY base64 ed25519 private key for signing Sparkle updates. 18 # Generate once: download Sparkle's tools, run `./bin/generate_keys` 19 # (stores the key in your Keychain + prints SUPublicEDKey, already 20 # set in project.yml), then export with `./bin/generate_keys -x key.txt` 21 # and paste key.txt's contents into this secret. Optional — if unset, 22 # the release still ships but no appcast is generated (no auto-update). 23 24 name: Release 25 26 on: 27 push: 28 tags: 29 - 'v*' 30 workflow_dispatch: 31 inputs: 32 tag: 33 description: 'Tag to build (e.g. v0.2.0). For manual dry runs.' 34 required: true 35 36 permissions: 37 contents: write # gh release create / upload 38 39 concurrency: 40 group: release-${{ github.ref }} 41 cancel-in-progress: false 42 43 jobs: 44 build: 45 runs-on: macos-15 46 timeout-minutes: 60 47 48 steps: 49 - uses: actions/checkout@v4 50 with: 51 fetch-depth: 0 # so `gh release --generate-notes` can diff against the previous tag 52 53 - name: Resolve version 54 id: version 55 run: | 56 set -euo pipefail 57 if [[ "${{ github.event_name }}" == "workflow_dispatch" ]]; then 58 TAG="${{ inputs.tag }}" 59 else 60 TAG="${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/}" 61 fi 62 VERSION="${TAG#v}" 63 echo "tag=$TAG" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT" 64 echo "version=$VERSION" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT" 65 echo "build=${GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT" 66 echo "Building $TAG (MARKETING_VERSION=$VERSION, CFBundleVersion=$GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER)" 67 68 - name: Select latest Xcode 69 run: | 70 set -euo pipefail 71 # mlx-audio-swift's Package.swift uses `swift-tools-version:6.2`, which requires 72 # Xcode 16.4+. The macos-15 image's default xcode-select may be on 16.1 (Swift 6.1). 73 LATEST=$(ls -d /Applications/Xcode_*.app | sort -V | tail -1) 74 echo "Selecting $LATEST" 75 sudo xcode-select -s "$LATEST" 76 xcodebuild -version 77 swift --version 78 79 - name: Install build deps 80 run: brew install xcodegen 81 82 - name: Generate Xcode project 83 run: xcodegen generate 84 85 - name: Import signing certificate 86 env: 87 P12_BASE64: ${{ secrets.DEVELOPER_ID_CERT_P12_BASE64 }} 88 P12_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.DEVELOPER_ID_CERT_P12_PASSWORD }} 89 KEYCHAIN_PASS: ${{ secrets.KEYCHAIN_PASSWORD }} 90 run: | 91 set -euo pipefail 92 KEYCHAIN="$RUNNER_TEMP/build.keychain-db" 93 94 security create-keychain -p "$KEYCHAIN_PASS" "$KEYCHAIN" 95 security set-keychain-settings -lut 21600 "$KEYCHAIN" 96 security unlock-keychain -p "$KEYCHAIN_PASS" "$KEYCHAIN" 97 98 echo "$P12_BASE64" | base64 --decode > "$RUNNER_TEMP/cert.p12" 99 security import "$RUNNER_TEMP/cert.p12" \ 100 -P "$P12_PASSWORD" \ 101 -A -t cert -f pkcs12 \ 102 -k "$KEYCHAIN" 103 rm -f "$RUNNER_TEMP/cert.p12" 104 105 # Prepend our keychain to the search list so codesign finds it. 106 security list-keychains -d user -s "$KEYCHAIN" $(security list-keychains -d user | tr -d '"') 107 108 # Allow codesign / productsign to use the key without a UI prompt. 109 security set-key-partition-list -S apple-tool:,apple: -k "$KEYCHAIN_PASS" "$KEYCHAIN" >/dev/null 110 111 # Surface the identity that ended up installed so a missing cert is obvious in the log. 112 security find-identity -v -p codesigning "$KEYCHAIN" 113 114 echo "BUILD_KEYCHAIN=$KEYCHAIN" >> "$GITHUB_ENV" 115 116 - name: Archive 117 env: 118 MARKETING_VERSION: ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }} 119 CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION: ${{ steps.version.outputs.build }} 120 run: | 121 set -euo pipefail 122 xcodebuild archive \ 123 -project ThinkAloud.xcodeproj \ 124 -scheme ThinkAloud \ 125 -configuration Release \ 126 -archivePath "$RUNNER_TEMP/ThinkAloud.xcarchive" \ 127 -destination 'generic/platform=macOS' \ 128 MARKETING_VERSION="$MARKETING_VERSION" \ 129 CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION="$CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION" \ 130 CODE_SIGN_STYLE=Manual \ 131 CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY="Developer ID Application" \ 132 DEVELOPMENT_TEAM=5H75SGA7KP \ 133 OTHER_CODE_SIGN_FLAGS="--timestamp" \ 134 COMPILER_INDEX_STORE_ENABLE=NO 135 136 - name: Export .app 137 run: | 138 set -euo pipefail 139 xcodebuild -exportArchive \ 140 -archivePath "$RUNNER_TEMP/ThinkAloud.xcarchive" \ 141 -exportOptionsPlist scripts/ExportOptions.plist \ 142 -exportPath "$RUNNER_TEMP/export" 143 ls -la "$RUNNER_TEMP/export" 144 145 - name: Verify .app signature + hardened runtime 146 run: | 147 set -euo pipefail 148 APP="$RUNNER_TEMP/export/ThinkAloud.app" 149 codesign --verify --strict --deep --verbose=2 "$APP" 150 codesign --display --verbose=4 "$APP" 2>&1 | grep -E 'Authority|Timestamp|Runtime' || true 151 # Confirms `flags=0x10000(runtime)` is present — required by the notary. 152 codesign --display --verbose=2 "$APP" 2>&1 | grep -q 'runtime' \ 153 || { echo "::error::Hardened runtime missing from signed .app"; exit 1; } 154 155 - name: Build DMG 156 id: dmg 157 run: | 158 set -euo pipefail 159 VERSION="${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}" 160 APP="$RUNNER_TEMP/export/ThinkAloud.app" 161 DMG_NAME="ThinkAloud-$VERSION.dmg" 162 DMG_PATH="$RUNNER_TEMP/$DMG_NAME" 163 STAGING="$RUNNER_TEMP/dmg-staging" 164 165 mkdir -p "$STAGING" 166 cp -R "$APP" "$STAGING/" 167 ln -s /Applications "$STAGING/Applications" # drag-to-install affordance 168 169 hdiutil create \ 170 -volname "ThinkAloud" \ 171 -srcfolder "$STAGING" \ 172 -ov -format UDZO \ 173 "$DMG_PATH" 174 175 echo "path=$DMG_PATH" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT" 176 echo "name=$DMG_NAME" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT" 177 178 - name: Sign DMG 179 run: | 180 codesign --sign "Developer ID Application" --timestamp \ 181 "${{ steps.dmg.outputs.path }}" 182 codesign --verify --verbose=2 "${{ steps.dmg.outputs.path }}" 183 184 - name: Notarize DMG 185 id: notarize 186 env: 187 ASC_API_KEY_ID: ${{ secrets.NOTARY_API_KEY_ID }} 188 ASC_API_ISSUER_ID: ${{ secrets.NOTARY_API_ISSUER_ID }} 189 ASC_API_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.NOTARY_API_KEY_P8_BASE64 }} 190 run: | 191 set -euo pipefail 192 KEY_PATH="$RUNNER_TEMP/AuthKey.p8" 193 echo "$ASC_API_KEY_BASE64" | base64 --decode > "$KEY_PATH" 194 195 # `notarytool submit --wait` returns non-zero only on transport errors. A submission 196 # accepted-by-server-but-rejected-by-notary returns 0 with status=Invalid, so we parse 197 # the JSON output and decide ourselves whether to fail. 198 SUBMIT_JSON=$(xcrun notarytool submit "${{ steps.dmg.outputs.path }}" \ 199 --key "$KEY_PATH" \ 200 --key-id "$ASC_API_KEY_ID" \ 201 --issuer "$ASC_API_ISSUER_ID" \ 202 --wait \ 203 --output-format json) 204 echo "$SUBMIT_JSON" 205 206 SUBMISSION_ID=$(printf '%s' "$SUBMIT_JSON" | jq -r '.id') 207 STATUS=$(printf '%s' "$SUBMIT_JSON" | jq -r '.status') 208 echo "submission_id=$SUBMISSION_ID" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT" 209 210 if [[ "$STATUS" != "Accepted" ]]; then 211 echo "::error::Notarization status: $STATUS — dumping log." 212 xcrun notarytool log "$SUBMISSION_ID" \ 213 --key "$KEY_PATH" --key-id "$ASC_API_KEY_ID" --issuer "$ASC_API_ISSUER_ID" 214 rm -f "$KEY_PATH" 215 exit 1 216 fi 217 rm -f "$KEY_PATH" 218 219 - name: Staple + Gatekeeper assess 220 run: | 221 set -euo pipefail 222 xcrun stapler staple "${{ steps.dmg.outputs.path }}" 223 xcrun stapler validate "${{ steps.dmg.outputs.path }}" 224 spctl --assess --type open --context context:primary-signature -v \ 225 "${{ steps.dmg.outputs.path }}" 226 227 - name: Generate Sparkle appcast 228 id: appcast 229 env: 230 # base64 ed25519 private key exported via `generate_keys -x`. If unset, the appcast is 231 # skipped (the release still ships, but auto-update won't be served for it). 232 SPARKLE_ED_PRIVATE_KEY: ${{ secrets.SPARKLE_ED_PRIVATE_KEY }} 233 run: | 234 set -euo pipefail 235 if [[ -z "${SPARKLE_ED_PRIVATE_KEY:-}" ]]; then 236 echo "::warning::SPARKLE_ED_PRIVATE_KEY secret not set — skipping appcast generation. Auto-update will not be served for this release." 237 exit 0 238 fi 239 240 VERSION="${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}" 241 BUILD="${{ steps.version.outputs.build }}" 242 TAG="${{ steps.version.outputs.tag }}" 243 DMG="${{ steps.dmg.outputs.path }}" 244 DMG_NAME="${{ steps.dmg.outputs.name }}" 245 246 # Fetch Sparkle's signing tools. The EdDSA signature format is stable across 2.x, so we 247 # pin the tool version independently of the framework version resolved by SwiftPM. 248 SPARKLE_TOOLS_VERSION="2.9.2" 249 curl -sL -o "$RUNNER_TEMP/sparkle.tar.xz" \ 250 "https://github.com/sparkle-project/Sparkle/releases/download/${SPARKLE_TOOLS_VERSION}/Sparkle-${SPARKLE_TOOLS_VERSION}.tar.xz" 251 mkdir -p "$RUNNER_TEMP/sparkle" 252 tar -xf "$RUNNER_TEMP/sparkle.tar.xz" -C "$RUNNER_TEMP/sparkle" 253 254 # Sign the FINAL stapled DMG (the exact bytes users download). Emits: 255 # sparkle:edSignature="…" length="…" 256 SIG_ATTRS=$(printf '%s' "$SPARKLE_ED_PRIVATE_KEY" \ 257 | "$RUNNER_TEMP/sparkle/bin/sign_update" "$DMG" --ed-key-file -) 258 echo "Signature: $SIG_ATTRS" 259 260 ENCLOSURE_URL="https://github.com/${GITHUB_REPOSITORY}/releases/download/${TAG}/${DMG_NAME}" 261 PUB_DATE="$(date '+%a, %d %b %Y %H:%M:%S %z')" 262 APPCAST="$RUNNER_TEMP/appcast.xml" 263 264 # `releases/latest/download/appcast.xml` (the SUFeedURL) always resolves to the newest 265 # published release's copy of this file; the enclosure points at the immutable per-tag URL. 266 cat > "$APPCAST" < 268 269 270 ThinkAloud 271 https://github.com/${GITHUB_REPOSITORY} 272 ThinkAloud automatic updates 273 en 274 275 ThinkAloud ${VERSION} 276 ${BUILD} 277 ${VERSION} 278 15.0 279 ${PUB_DATE} 280 See the full release notes on GitHub.

]]> 281 282 283 284 285 EOF 286 287 echo "path=$APPCAST" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT" 288 echo "--- appcast.xml ---" 289 cat "$APPCAST" 290 291 - name: Publish GitHub Release 292 env: 293 GH_TOKEN: ${{ github.token }} 294 run: | 295 set -euo pipefail 296 TAG="${{ steps.version.outputs.tag }}" 297 DMG="${{ steps.dmg.outputs.path }}" 298 APPCAST="${{ steps.appcast.outputs.path }}" 299 300 # Upload the appcast alongside the DMG when it was generated (secret present). 301 ASSETS=("$DMG") 302 if [[ -n "$APPCAST" && -f "$APPCAST" ]]; then 303 ASSETS+=("$APPCAST") 304 fi 305 306 if gh release view "$TAG" >/dev/null 2>&1; then 307 echo "Release $TAG already exists — uploading assets with --clobber." 308 gh release upload "$TAG" "${ASSETS[@]}" --clobber 309 else 310 gh release create "$TAG" "${ASSETS[@]}" \ 311 --title "ThinkAloud ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}" \ 312 --generate-notes 313 fi 314 315 - name: Upload DMG as build artifact 316 if: steps.dmg.outputs.path != '' 317 uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4 318 with: 319 name: ${{ steps.dmg.outputs.name }} 320 path: ${{ steps.dmg.outputs.path }} 321 retention-days: 14 322 323 - name: Clean up keychain 324 if: always() 325 run: security delete-keychain "$BUILD_KEYCHAIN" || true 326

# Tag-driven signed + notarized DMG release. # # Triggers on tags matching `v*` (e.g. `v0.2.0`). Also runnable manually for dry runs. # # Required repository secrets: # DEVELOPER_ID_CERT_P12_BASE64 base64-encoded .p12 export of the # "Developer ID Application: (5H75SGA7KP)" cert # (Keychain Access → right-click cert → Export, set a password). # `base64 -i cert.p12 | pbcopy` to get the value. # DEVELOPER_ID_CERT_P12_PASSWORD the password set when exporting the .p12 # KEYCHAIN_PASSWORD any random string — used as the temp keychain's password # (rotates per run, never persisted) # NOTARY_API_KEY_ID App Store Connect API Key ID (e.g. "ABCDE12345") # NOTARY_API_ISSUER_ID ASC API issuer UUID (Users and Access → Integrations) # NOTARY_API_KEY_P8_BASE64 base64-encoded contents of the AuthKey_*.p8 file # (`base64 -i AuthKey_XXX.p8 | pbcopy`) # SPARKLE_ED_PRIVATE_KEY base64 ed25519 private key for signing Sparkle updates. # Generate once: download Sparkle's tools, run `./bin/generate_keys` # (stores the key in your Keychain + prints SUPublicEDKey, already # set in project.yml), then export with `./bin/generate_keys -x key.txt` # and paste key.txt's contents into this secret. Optional — if unset, # the release still ships but no appcast is generated (no auto-update). name: Release on: push: tags: - 'v*' workflow_dispatch: inputs: tag: description: 'Tag to build (e.g. v0.2.0). For manual dry runs.' required: true permissions: contents: write # gh release create / upload concurrency: group: release-${{ github.ref }} cancel-in-progress: false jobs: build: runs-on: macos-15 timeout-minutes: 60 steps: - uses: actions/checkout@v4 with: fetch-depth: 0 # so `gh release --generate-notes` can diff against the previous tag - name: Resolve version id: version run: | set -euo pipefail if [[ "${{ github.event_name }}" == "workflow_dispatch" ]]; then TAG="${{ inputs.tag }}" else TAG="${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/}" fi VERSION="${TAG#v}" echo "tag=$TAG" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT" echo "version=$VERSION" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT" echo "build=${GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT" echo "Building $TAG (MARKETING_VERSION=$VERSION, CFBundleVersion=$GITHUB_RUN_NUMBER)" - name: Select latest Xcode run: | set -euo pipefail # mlx-audio-swift's Package.swift uses `swift-tools-version:6.2`, which requires # Xcode 16.4+. The macos-15 image's default xcode-select may be on 16.1 (Swift 6.1). LATEST=$(ls -d /Applications/Xcode_*.app | sort -V | tail -1) echo "Selecting $LATEST" sudo xcode-select -s "$LATEST" xcodebuild -version swift --version - name: Install build deps run: brew install xcodegen - name: Generate Xcode project run: xcodegen generate - name: Import signing certificate env: P12_BASE64: ${{ secrets.DEVELOPER_ID_CERT_P12_BASE64 }} P12_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.DEVELOPER_ID_CERT_P12_PASSWORD }} KEYCHAIN_PASS: ${{ secrets.KEYCHAIN_PASSWORD }} run: | set -euo pipefail KEYCHAIN="$RUNNER_TEMP/build.keychain-db" security create-keychain -p "$KEYCHAIN_PASS" "$KEYCHAIN" security set-keychain-settings -lut 21600 "$KEYCHAIN" security unlock-keychain -p "$KEYCHAIN_PASS" "$KEYCHAIN" echo "$P12_BASE64" | base64 --decode > "$RUNNER_TEMP/cert.p12" security import "$RUNNER_TEMP/cert.p12" \ -P "$P12_PASSWORD" \ -A -t cert -f pkcs12 \ -k "$KEYCHAIN" rm -f "$RUNNER_TEMP/cert.p12" # Prepend our keychain to the search list so codesign finds it. security list-keychains -d user -s "$KEYCHAIN" $(security list-keychains -d user | tr -d '"') # Allow codesign / productsign to use the key without a UI prompt. security set-key-partition-list -S apple-tool:,apple: -k "$KEYCHAIN_PASS" "$KEYCHAIN" >/dev/null # Surface the identity that ended up installed so a missing cert is obvious in the log. security find-identity -v -p codesigning "$KEYCHAIN" echo "BUILD_KEYCHAIN=$KEYCHAIN" >> "$GITHUB_ENV" - name: Archive env: MARKETING_VERSION: ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }} CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION: ${{ steps.version.outputs.build }} run: | set -euo pipefail xcodebuild archive \ -project ThinkAloud.xcodeproj \ -scheme ThinkAloud \ -configuration Release \ -archivePath "$RUNNER_TEMP/ThinkAloud.xcarchive" \ -destination 'generic/platform=macOS' \ MARKETING_VERSION="$MARKETING_VERSION" \ CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION="$CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION" \ CODE_SIGN_STYLE=Manual \ CODE_SIGN_IDENTITY="Developer ID Application" \ DEVELOPMENT_TEAM=5H75SGA7KP \ OTHER_CODE_SIGN_FLAGS="--timestamp" \ COMPILER_INDEX_STORE_ENABLE=NO - name: Export .app run: | set -euo pipefail xcodebuild -exportArchive \ -archivePath "$RUNNER_TEMP/ThinkAloud.xcarchive" \ -exportOptionsPlist scripts/ExportOptions.plist \ -exportPath "$RUNNER_TEMP/export" ls -la "$RUNNER_TEMP/export" - name: Verify .app signature + hardened runtime run: | set -euo pipefail APP="$RUNNER_TEMP/export/ThinkAloud.app" codesign --verify --strict --deep --verbose=2 "$APP" codesign --display --verbose=4 "$APP" 2>&1 | grep -E 'Authority|Timestamp|Runtime' || true # Confirms `flags=0x10000(runtime)` is present — required by the notary. codesign --display --verbose=2 "$APP" 2>&1 | grep -q 'runtime' \ || { echo "::error::Hardened runtime missing from signed .app"; exit 1; } - name: Build DMG id: dmg run: | set -euo pipefail VERSION="${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}" APP="$RUNNER_TEMP/export/ThinkAloud.app" DMG_NAME="ThinkAloud-$VERSION.dmg" DMG_PATH="$RUNNER_TEMP/$DMG_NAME" STAGING="$RUNNER_TEMP/dmg-staging" mkdir -p "$STAGING" cp -R "$APP" "$STAGING/" ln -s /Applications "$STAGING/Applications" # drag-to-install affordance hdiutil create \ -volname "ThinkAloud" \ -srcfolder "$STAGING" \ -ov -format UDZO \ "$DMG_PATH" echo "path=$DMG_PATH" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT" echo "name=$DMG_NAME" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT" - name: Sign DMG run: | codesign --sign "Developer ID Application" --timestamp \ "${{ steps.dmg.outputs.path }}" codesign --verify --verbose=2 "${{ steps.dmg.outputs.path }}" - name: Notarize DMG id: notarize env: ASC_API_KEY_ID: ${{ secrets.NOTARY_API_KEY_ID }} ASC_API_ISSUER_ID: ${{ secrets.NOTARY_API_ISSUER_ID }} ASC_API_KEY_BASE64: ${{ secrets.NOTARY_API_KEY_P8_BASE64 }} run: | set -euo pipefail KEY_PATH="$RUNNER_TEMP/AuthKey.p8" echo "$ASC_API_KEY_BASE64" | base64 --decode > "$KEY_PATH" # `notarytool submit --wait` returns non-zero only on transport errors. A submission # accepted-by-server-but-rejected-by-notary returns 0 with status=Invalid, so we parse # the JSON output and decide ourselves whether to fail. SUBMIT_JSON=$(xcrun notarytool submit "${{ steps.dmg.outputs.path }}" \ --key "$KEY_PATH" \ --key-id "$ASC_API_KEY_ID" \ --issuer "$ASC_API_ISSUER_ID" \ --wait \ --output-format json) echo "$SUBMIT_JSON" SUBMISSION_ID=$(printf '%s' "$SUBMIT_JSON" | jq -r '.id') STATUS=$(printf '%s' "$SUBMIT_JSON" | jq -r '.status') echo "submission_id=$SUBMISSION_ID" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT" if [[ "$STATUS" != "Accepted" ]]; then echo "::error::Notarization status: $STATUS — dumping log." xcrun notarytool log "$SUBMISSION_ID" \ --key "$KEY_PATH" --key-id "$ASC_API_KEY_ID" --issuer "$ASC_API_ISSUER_ID" rm -f "$KEY_PATH" exit 1 fi rm -f "$KEY_PATH" - name: Staple + Gatekeeper assess run: | set -euo pipefail xcrun stapler staple "${{ steps.dmg.outputs.path }}" xcrun stapler validate "${{ steps.dmg.outputs.path }}" spctl --assess --type open --context context:primary-signature -v \ "${{ steps.dmg.outputs.path }}" - name: Generate Sparkle appcast id: appcast env: # base64 ed25519 private key exported via `generate_keys -x`. If unset, the appcast is # skipped (the release still ships, but auto-update won't be served for it). SPARKLE_ED_PRIVATE_KEY: ${{ secrets.SPARKLE_ED_PRIVATE_KEY }} run: | set -euo pipefail if [[ -z "${SPARKLE_ED_PRIVATE_KEY:-}" ]]; then echo "::warning::SPARKLE_ED_PRIVATE_KEY secret not set — skipping appcast generation. Auto-update will not be served for this release." exit 0 fi VERSION="${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}" BUILD="${{ steps.version.outputs.build }}" TAG="${{ steps.version.outputs.tag }}" DMG="${{ steps.dmg.outputs.path }}" DMG_NAME="${{ steps.dmg.outputs.name }}" # Fetch Sparkle's signing tools. The EdDSA signature format is stable across 2.x, so we # pin the tool version independently of the framework version resolved by SwiftPM. SPARKLE_TOOLS_VERSION="2.9.2" curl -sL -o "$RUNNER_TEMP/sparkle.tar.xz" \ "https://github.com/sparkle-project/Sparkle/releases/download/${SPARKLE_TOOLS_VERSION}/Sparkle-${SPARKLE_TOOLS_VERSION}.tar.xz" mkdir -p "$RUNNER_TEMP/sparkle" tar -xf "$RUNNER_TEMP/sparkle.tar.xz" -C "$RUNNER_TEMP/sparkle" # Sign the FINAL stapled DMG (the exact bytes users download). Emits: # sparkle:edSignature="…" length="…" SIG_ATTRS=$(printf '%s' "$SPARKLE_ED_PRIVATE_KEY" \ | "$RUNNER_TEMP/sparkle/bin/sign_update" "$DMG" --ed-key-file -) echo "Signature: $SIG_ATTRS" ENCLOSURE_URL="https://github.com/${GITHUB_REPOSITORY}/releases/download/${TAG}/${DMG_NAME}" PUB_DATE="$(date '+%a, %d %b %Y %H:%M:%S %z')" APPCAST="$RUNNER_TEMP/appcast.xml" # `releases/latest/download/appcast.xml` (the SUFeedURL) always resolves to the newest # published release's copy of this file; the enclosure points at the immutable per-tag URL. cat > "$APPCAST" < ThinkAloud https://github.com/${GITHUB_REPOSITORY} ThinkAloud automatic updates en ThinkAloud ${VERSION} ${BUILD} ${VERSION} 15.0 ${PUB_DATE} See the full release notes on GitHub.

]]> EOF echo "path=$APPCAST" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT" echo "--- appcast.xml ---" cat "$APPCAST" - name: Publish GitHub Release env: GH_TOKEN: ${{ github.token }} run: | set -euo pipefail TAG="${{ steps.version.outputs.tag }}" DMG="${{ steps.dmg.outputs.path }}" APPCAST="${{ steps.appcast.outputs.path }}" # Upload the appcast alongside the DMG when it was generated (secret present). ASSETS=("$DMG") if [[ -n "$APPCAST" && -f "$APPCAST" ]]; then ASSETS+=("$APPCAST") fi if gh release view "$TAG" >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Release $TAG already exists — uploading assets with --clobber." gh release upload "$TAG" "${ASSETS[@]}" --clobber else gh release create "$TAG" "${ASSETS[@]}" \ --title "ThinkAloud ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}" \ --generate-notes fi - name: Upload DMG as build artifact if: steps.dmg.outputs.path != '' uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4 with: name: ${{ steps.dmg.outputs.name }} path: ${{ steps.dmg.outputs.path }} retention-days: 14 - name: Clean up keychain if: always() run: security delete-keychain "$BUILD_KEYCHAIN" || true

lastPrompt: 開新的 branch，然後 commit 這些 changes，然後發 PR，等 CI 過了之後就合併，然後打 v0.2.1 的 tag。

aiTitle: 審查並優化整個應用程式的效能問題

content.text:
關鍵理解：
- **CI（ci.yml）**：PR 上跑一次 Debug build（`CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO`，macos-15），這就是「CI 過了」的判準。
- **Release（release.yml）**：由推 `v*` tag 觸發；`MARKETING_VERSION` 在 build 時**從 tag 注入**（`v0.2.1`→`0.2.1`），`CFBundleVersion` 用 run number。所以 release app 版本由 tag 決定，project.yml 的 `0.2.0` 只是本機 Debug 預設。

先確認幾件事再決定要不要順手 bump project.yml：`.xcodeproj` 是否被追蹤、`.claude/` 是否已被 gitignore（避免誤 commit）。

input.command: cd /Users/jacoblincool/Documents/GitHub/think-aloud; echo "=== is xcodeproj tracked? ==="; git ls-files ThinkAloud.xcodeproj | head -3; echo "(empty = not tracked)"; echo; echo "=== .gitignore ==="; cat .gitignore; echo; echo "=== is .claude ignored? ==="; git check-ignore .claude && echo "IGNORED" || echo "NOT IGNORED"

content.text:
兩個關鍵點：
1. **`.xcodeproj` 有被追蹤**，且 release.yml 的 `MARKETING_VERSION` 是**從 tag 注入**的 → 推 `v0.2.1` 後 release app 自動就是 0.2.1，**不需要**改 project.yml（改了還要重新 `xcodegen generate` 並可能引入無關 diff）。所以我讓 PR 只含這次的 7 個 Swift 檔，版本一致性由 tag 保證。
2. **`.claude/` 沒被 gitignore** → 我只會明確 stage 那 7 個檔案，不會誤commit `.claude/`。

開始執行。建立分支，並把這次工作拆成兩個聚焦的 commit（perf 與 feat，檔案集互斥）：

input.command:
cd /Users/jacoblincool/Documents/GitHub/think-aloud
set -e
git checkout -b perf-jank-and-download-progress
git add ThinkAloud/Core/Audio/AudioRecorder.swift \
        ThinkAloud/UI/Popup/PopupCoordinator.swift \
        ThinkAloud/UI/Popup/PopupStateViews.swift \
        ThinkAloud/UI/DatasetBrowser/RecordRowView.swift \
        ThinkAloud/UI/DatasetBrowser/AppIcons.swift
git commit -q -F - <<'EOF'
perf: smooth recording timer/meter and dataset list scrolling

- Recording: replace the per-buffer (~47/s) MainActor level-callback push
  with a pull model (AudioRecorder.currentLevel); compute elapsed locally
  on the MainActor (no actor hop); drive both from one ~15Hz loop. Split
  RecordingPopupView into TimerLabel/LevelMeter leaf views so a tick only
  re-renders the changing leaf instead of the whole popup (pulse icon,
  buttons, level meter included).
- Dataset list: static-cache RecordRowView's DateFormatter and
  RelativeDateTimeFormatter and parse the ISO timestamp once per row,
  instead of allocating formatters on every body eval while scrolling.
- AppIcons: cache nil results so unresolved bundle IDs stop re-hitting
  Launch Services synchronously on every render.
EOF
echo "--- commit 1 done ---"
git add ThinkAloud/Core/ASR/ModelManager.swift \
        ThinkAloud/UI/Settings/AdvancedPane.swift
git commit -q -F - <<'EOF'
feat(model): show download percentage in Advanced pane

ModelManager now publishes a per-profile download status (polled at 4Hz)
so the Advanced pane can render "Downloading X% (downloaded / total)" as
text for any model — including non-active profiles fetched via a transient
runtime, whose status never reaches the shared runtimeStatus.
EOF
echo "--- commit 2 done ---"
git --no-pager log --oneline -3
echo "--- status ---"
git status -sb

aiTitle: 審查並優化整個應用程式的效能問題

content.text: 兩個 commit 乾淨完成，`.claude/` 保持未追蹤。現在推送並建立 PR。

input.command:
cd /Users/jacoblincool/Documents/GitHub/think-aloud
set -e
git push -u origin perf-jank-and-download-progress 2>&1 | tail -5
echo "--- creating PR ---"
gh pr create --base main --head perf-jank-and-download-progress \
  --title "perf: fix recording-timer & list-scroll jank + show download % in Advanced" \
  --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## What & why

Addresses user-reported UI jank in two flows, plus a small download-progress gap.

### perf: recording timer/meter (commit 1)
The recording elapsed-time display stuttered. Root cause was two un-coalesced high-frequency pipelines flooding the MainActor:
- the audio tap pushed a **MainActor `Task` per buffer (~47/s)** to update the level, and
- a 100ms timer hopped into the `AudioRecorder` actor (busy ingesting those buffers) just to read the clock,
- while `RecordingPopupView` read `elapsedSeconds` + `levelRMS` + `levelPeak` in one body → the **whole popup re-rendered ~57×/s**.

Fix:
- `AudioRecorder` exposes `currentLevel` (pull model); the per-buffer level **callback path is removed** (the sample-append ingest `Task` — the only path into `outputBuffers` — is kept).
- Elapsed time is computed **locally on the MainActor** from a captured start `Date` (no actor hop).
- One **~15Hz loop** writes elapsed + RMS + peak together; `recordActivity` fires on whole-second crossings.
- `RecordingPopupView` is split into `RecordingTimerLabel` / `RecordingLevelMeter` **leaf views**, so a tick only re-renders the changing leaf — not the pulse icon, buttons, or meter.

### perf: dataset list scrolling (commit 1)
`RecordRowView` allocated a fresh `DateFormatter` **and** `RelativeDateTimeFormatter` (and parsed the ISO timestamp twice) on **every row, every body eval** → dropped frames while scrolling. Now the formatters are `static let` and the date is parsed once per body. `AppIcons` also caches `nil` so unresolved bundle IDs stop re-hitting Launch Services per render.

### feat: download % in Advanced pane (commit 2)
Per-model downloads in Settings → Advanced only showed a spinner + "Downloading…". `ModelManager` now publishes a per-profile download status (polled at 4Hz) — including non-active profiles fetched via a transient runtime — so the row shows **"Downloading X% (downloaded / total)"** as text (Settings → Model already had this).

## Verification
- `xcodebuild build` (Debug, Swift 6 strict concurrency) — **succeeds, no warnings** in the touched files.
- Full unit-test suite (42 tests) passes (re-run with signing; the touched paths have no direct test coverage).
- No behavior-preservation traps tripped: display cadence ≥10Hz, per-token `rawTranscript` write preserved, the ingest sample-append `Task` untouched.

## Notes
- Release version is injected from the tag by `release.yml`, so this PR intentionally does **not** bump `MARKETING_VERSION` in `project.yml`.
EOF
)" 2>&1 | tail -5

done

content.text:
全部完成，end-to-end 驗證無誤 🎉

## 完整流程結果

| 步驟 | 結果 |
|---|---|
| 分支 `perf-jank-and-download-progress` | ✅ 2 個聚焦 commit（perf / feat）|
| PR **#3** | ✅ 已開、已 squash 合併到 main（commit `be98b3a`）、分支已刪 |
| CI（`ci.yml`）| ✅ build 通過，8m0s |
| Tag `v0.2.1` | ✅ 推送（annotated，指向 `be98b3a`）|
| Release（`release.yml`）| ✅ 成功 — 簽章＋公證＋裝訂 DMG、Sparkle appcast |

**已發佈：** https://github.com/JacobLinCool/think-aloud/releases/tag/v0.2.1
- `ThinkAloud-0.2.1.dmg`（≈23 MB，Developer ID 簽章 + 公證 + stapled）
- `appcast.xml`（1085 bytes）→ 現有 0.2.0 使用者會透過 Sparkle 自動收到 0.2.1 更新

**本次釋出內容：** 修復錄音計時/音量卡頓、資料集清單捲動卡頓、AppIcons 重複查詢；新增 Advanced pane 逐模型下載的百分比文字顯示。

## 一個小插曲（已處理）
中途 release 監看腳本誤報失敗——原因是我的輪詢腳本在 zsh 用了保留唯讀變數 `status`，腳本自身崩潰、**不是 release 失敗**。改用非保留變數名重跑後確認 release 一路正常並成功。這也提醒我之後寫 zsh 輪詢避免用 `status`/`path` 這類保留名。

版本一致性說明：release app 版本（0.2.1）由 tag 在 build 時注入，`project.yml` 的 `MARKETING_VERSION` 仍是 `0.2.0`（只影響本機 Debug 預設）。若你希望原始碼也同步顯示 0.2.1，我可以另開一個小 PR bump 它（需一併 `xcodegen generate` 更新 committed 的 `.xcodeproj`）。要的話跟我說即可。

lastPrompt: 開新的 branch，然後 commit 這些 changes，然後發 PR，等 CI 過了之後就合併，然後打 v0.2.1 的 tag。
